meta.name: Mullusi
meta.purpose: Structured public website content for Mullusi.

proofLanes.label: Identity
proofLanes.title: Immutable public boundary
proofLanes.summary: Mullusi is presented as one governed system across website, docs, repositories, sandbox, metrics, and public contact paths.

proofLanes.label: Governance
proofLanes.title: Claims tied to evidence
proofLanes.summary: Public claims are separated into the deployed website, private incubation, planned domains, and operational interfaces.

proofLanes.label: Structure
proofLanes.title: Content is data-backed
proofLanes.summary: Deployment card, staged domain engines, interface links, proof lanes, and roadmap stages are modeled as structured records.

proofLanes.label: Evolution
proofLanes.title: Expansion without redesign
proofLanes.summary: New repositories and domains enter the public site only after their release boundary is verified.

interfaces.name: Docs
interfaces.summary: Reference material, architecture notes, and public learning paths.

interfaces.name: Sandbox
interfaces.summary: Experimental surface for governed demonstrations and prototypes.

interfaces.name: API
interfaces.summary: Public gateway reserved for service contracts and machine-facing endpoints.

interfaces.name: Metrics
interfaces.summary: Evidence plane reserved for runtime metrics, audits, graphs, and release witnesses.

services.name: Mullusi Govern Cloud
services.summary: Hosted symbolic governance for constraint evaluation, causal verdicts, proof states, and append-only trace records.

services.name: Developer Packages
services.summary: Client SDK, CLI, and local validators that submit governed requests to Mullusi services without becoming the paid service itself.

services.name: Mullusi Dashboard
services.summary: Project control, trace review, proof stamps, violations, usage, teams, and release witness visibility.

services.name: Mullu Inspect Service
services.summary: Website, API, repository, and workflow inspection that reports structural gaps, missing evidence, and unstable public claims.

services.name: Mfidel Validation Service
services.summary: Atomic fidel validation for grid references, overlay metadata, and public text checks without shape or sound decomposition.

services.name: Enterprise Mullusi
services.summary: Private cloud or customer-controlled deployment with custom governance rules, audit export, and support boundaries.

serviceTiers.name: Free
serviceTiers.summary: Explore the SDK, CLI, sandbox examples, public docs, and small-volume hosted evaluations.

serviceTiers.name: Pro
serviceTiers.summary: Higher hosted evaluation limits, persistent traces, project history, proof stamp access, and dashboard workspace control.

serviceTiers.name: Team
serviceTiers.summary: Shared projects, team trace review, role boundaries, audit export, environment separation, and release witness records.

serviceTiers.name: Enterprise
serviceTiers.summary: Private cloud or customer-controlled deployment, custom governance rules, support boundary, and compliance evidence exports.

serviceTiers.name: Certification
serviceTiers.summary: Paid proof review, structural inspection, violation report, repair plan, and Mullusi proof-of-resolution stamp.

apiContracts.name: Govern Evaluation
apiContracts.output: verdict, proof state, violations, trace reference, repair actions, storage state, proof stamp eligibility
apiContracts.summary: Evaluates a proposed action or system state against Mullusi governance constraints and records a causal trace.

apiContracts.name: Trace Retrieval
apiContracts.input: evaluation reference and authorized project context
apiContracts.output: ordered phase deltas, blocked phase, judgments, and append-only lineage records
apiContracts.summary: Returns the evidence path behind a verdict so users can inspect cause, constraint, and repair state.

apiContracts.name: Proof Stamp Verification
apiContracts.output: stamp hash, signature state, verification state, evaluation reference, and persisted stamp envelope
apiContracts.summary: Verifies that a proof stamp belongs to a recorded evaluation and has not drifted from its stored lineage.

apiContracts.name: Mfidel Validation
apiContracts.input: atomic fidel references, grid coordinates, overlay metadata, and validation mode
apiContracts.output: pass or violation state with atomicity-preserving diagnostics
apiContracts.summary: Validates Mfidel records while preserving each fidel as an atomic symbol and rejecting decomposition paths.

repositoryHandoff.label: Lineage handoff
repositoryHandoff.title: Registry state feeds release state.
repositoryHandoff.summary: A private incubation project becomes a public repository only when its proof surface, docs route, and demo boundary are attached.

releaseStages.title: Register
releaseStages.summary: Add or revise a deployed public-surface record in the structured registry.

releaseStages.title: Attach
releaseStages.summary: Connect repository, docs, demo, proof, status, and contact routes.

releaseStages.title: Verify
releaseStages.summary: Confirm claims, accessibility, local rendering, and public boundary constraints.

releaseStages.title: Publish
releaseStages.summary: Expose the product surface only after the public boundary is verified.
